channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Great gift ideas to make Mother's Day memorable for mom
item.description: ABC News Live's Stephanie Ramos talks to parenting expert Katy Huie Harrison about Mother's Day gifts that can help mom relax on her day.

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: CDC tells US doctors be aware of imported hantavirus cases
item.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: U.S. fires on 2 more tankers as Washington awaits Iran response on deal
item.description: The U.S. military says its forces fired on two Iran-flagged oil tankers to stop them from docking at an Iranian port in violation of the U.S. blockade...

item.title: Man who survived hantavirus 24 years ago, but lost mom and sister, recounts experience
item.description: In 2002, Zermeño found out he contracted hantavirus after cleaning the family house following the death of his mother and sister. He had been exposed ...
